description: CSS Grid Layout: fr units, auto columns, repeat(), minmax(), fixed widths, gap variants
visual_assertions: The 1fr 2fr 1fr grid should show the middle column twice as wide as the outer columns
The auto 1fr auto grid should show outer cells sized to their content with the middle cell taking remaining space
The repeat(4, 1fr) grid should show 4 equal-width columns with 8 cells wrapping to 2 rows
The minmax(80px, 1fr) grid should show 3 equal columns each at least 80px wide
The fixed 100px 200px 100px grid should show the middle column visibly wider than the outer two
The mixed 80px 1fr 2fr grid should show the third column twice as wide as the second
gap: 4px grid cells should be very close together
gap: 24px grid cells should have noticeable space between them
Asymmetric gap (column-gap: 20px, row-gap: 8px) should show wider horizontal gaps than vertical
